prestazioni: BMW S62B50 (5.0L V8) engine rebuild with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by VAC Motorsports for 8,500 RPM reliability, paired with a Schrick 292° camshaft upgrade for optimized high-RPM airflow

Garrett GT4202 turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm) and TiAL MV-R 50mm blow-off valve, mated to a custom 4.5-inch stainless steel intercooler core by Bell Intercoolers and a bespoke 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Armytrix with quad 100mm outlets

Motec M190 ECU with a custom fuel system upgrade including dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a custom billet fuel rail by Radium Engineering, paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Peterson Fluid Systems with a 10-quart reservoir and dual scavenge pumps
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (KZ1-specific), featuring extended front fenders with integrated cooling ducts and a rear diffuser with active aerodynamics (adjustable via hydraulic actuators), all finished in raw 2x2 twill weave carbon fiber

Ohlins TTX40 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with custom rose-jointed suspension arms by SuperPro and a polycarbonate rear wing by APR Performance (KZ1-specific, 3-element design with adjustable angle of attack)

Custom interior by Sparco with a full carbon fiber dash (KZ1-specific mold), Alcantara-wrapped Recaro Pole Position seats (KZ1-specific bolsters), and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, FIA-spec) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline
